commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=6dd28f2f703c5d4c534bbea542ce2deed82c07db)
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes ACP task reconciliation and liveness checks, Gateway maintenance authority setup, task docs, CI/Testbox dependency setup, and a few adjacent type/lint fixes.

PR surface: Source +76, Tests +215, Docs +1, Config +3, Other +1. Total +296 across 15 files.

Reproducibility: no. live reproduction was run in this read-only pass. The linked issue has concrete restart-blocker logs, and the current-main source/tests reproduce the stale ACP task decision path at the unit level.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Protected label, dirty merge state, and current-main supersession make this a maintainer close/cherry-pick decision rather than an automation repair lane.

target.title: fix: reconcile stale ACP tasks safely
target.body:
Summary
- Fix ACP task reconciliation so Gateway-authoritative maintenance no longer treats persisted ACP session metadata alone as proof of a live background task after restart.
- Keep live in-process ACP turns protected through runtime startup, active streaming, and slow startup windows; offline CLI maintenance does not use the Gateway-only turn map to mark running ACP metadata lost.
- Repair changed-gate infrastructure discovered while validating: Testbox delegated checks now skip pnpm verify-deps auto-installs, external hoisted modules are exposed to lifecycle scripts during setup, and two existing type/lint issues are fixed.

Verification
- autoreview --mode local: clean, no accepted/actionable findings
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/tasks/task-registry.maintenance.issue-60299.test.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/tasks/task-registry.test.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/tasks/task-registry.maintenance.issue-60299.test.ts src/tasks/task-registry.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/tasks/task-registry.maintenance.issue-60299.test.ts src/tasks/task-registry.test.ts test/scripts/changed-lanes.test.ts src/shared/device-auth.test.ts src/shared/device-auth-store.test.ts src/commands/doctor-device-pairing.test.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/changed-lanes.test.ts
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo
- node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/openai-transport-stream.ts src/tasks/task-registry.maintenance.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.core.ts src/infra/device-auth-store.ts
- pnpm docs:check-mdx
- git diff --check
- pnpm check:changed via Blacksmith Testbox: tbx_01ksz66cjf8xkfpht9wsb2f6sj, GitHub Actions run 26714987125, exit 0

Fixes #88205
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
